page_title: 84% Polyester 10% Pu 6% Elastane softshell fabric - ArDoku - Ariteks
spec_line: 300 g/m², 84% Polyester 10% Pu 6% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Softshell Fabric
description_blocks: ArDoku is 84% polyester 10% pu 6% elastane softshell fabric. The top layer is elastic woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is polar fabric.
The basic usage is for winter jackets.
ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471

text_blocks.text: Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics Cloth Technical Textiles
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
300 g/m² , 84% Polyester 10% Pu 6% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Softshell Fabric.

ArDoku is 84% polyester 10% pu 6% elastane softshell fabric. The top layer is elastic woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is polar fabric. The basic usage is for winter jackets. ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471 Technical Parameters Fiber 84% Polyester (PES) 10% Polyurethane (PU) 6% Elastane (EL) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 300 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp > 40N ; Weft > 35N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 4,0 - 7,5 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Winter Jackets Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Waterproof Class 3,3 EN 343 High Visible Yes EN 20471 Technical Documents >> ArDoku Data Sheet Certificates

ArDoku is 84% polyester 10% pu 6% elastane softshell fabric. The top layer is elastic woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is polar fabric. The basic usage is for winter jackets. ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
